title: Deliciously Gooey Kenyan Ham Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Kenyan dish featuring charred and gooey ham, perfect for a snack or dinner. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is easy to make and fun to eat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the diced ham, bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, and pineapple chunks onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the ham is charred and the vegetables are tender.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as roasted potatoes or a green salad.
Repeat the recipe as needed to feed a crowd.
